create_access_error: I couldn't access that chat. Make sure I'm an admin with Invite Users permission. Error: {error}
create_error: Failed to create the link. Make sure I'm an admin with Invite Users permission in that chat. Error: {error}
create_invalid_chat_id_msg: Please send a numeric chat ID (e.g. -1001234567890).
create_not_a_channel: Channels Only Telegram's paid subscription feature only works with broadcast channels, not groups or supergroups. Please send the ID of a private channel you own.
create_not_private: Channel Must Be Private @{username} is a public channel — anyone can join it for free via its username, so Telegram will never enforce the Stars payment. To fix this: 1. Go to Channel Settings → Channel Type 2. Change it to Private 3. Then come back and try again. Note: Making the channel private means it can only be joined via invite links — exactly what you want for a paid community.
create_price_invalid: Enter a whole number between {min} and {max}.
create_step1_admin_hint: Requirements — read carefully: 1. The channel must be private (no public @username) 2. Click Add Bot as admin button to add the channel 3. Telegram Stars must be available in your region To make a channel private: Channel Settings → Channel Type → Private
create_step1_prompt: Tap the button below to add me as admin to your private channel — I'll detect it automatically. Or paste your private channel's ID manually (e.g. -1001234567890):
create_step2_prompt: Step 2/3 — Give this link a name for your reference (e.g. Monthly Members): The name is only visible to you — subscribers never see it.
create_step3_prompt: Step 3/3 — How many Telegram Stars per month? (Minimum: {min}, maximum: {max}) Subscribers are charged this amount every 30 days. Telegram handles renewals and cancellations automatically.
create_success_share: Share this link with your audience. Telegram will handle billing and renewals automatically.
list_empty: No links yet. Create your first one!
menu_body:
Create Stars subscription invite links for your private Telegram channels. Subscribers pay automatically every 30 days — Telegram handles billing.
Requirements: • The channel must be private (no public @username) • Your bot must be admin on the channel with Invite Users permission
revoke_confirm_warning: {e_warning} Are you sure you want to revoke this link? This action is irreversible — the link cannot be restored.
revoke_error_toast: ❌ Failed to revoke. Please try again.
revoke_success: Link revoked: {name} Existing members will not be affected immediately — Telegram will stop billing them at their next renewal date.
upgrade_body: Create Telegram Stars subscription invite links for your private channels. Subscribers pay recurring Stars to stay members — Telegram handles billing automatically.
upgrade_prompt:
Paid Community Telegram Stars subscription invite links require Advanced plan.
Advanced unlocks paid community links, up to 20 named referral campaigns, and drip sequences.
